name: loop-dispatch
description: Single front door for a repo's automation loops so one routine per repo can handle every loop event instead of one routine per event. Deterministically routes each triggering GitHub event to the matching loop (via route-event.sh); a non-matching event is a quiet no-op. Router only; each loop owns its guardrails. Also bundles new-loop-routine — the single source of truth for standing up a standardised loop routine per repo (config + canonical prompts + UI wiring steps). Repo-agnostic; requires github-ops and the loop skills it routes to.
